---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new command or improvement for UnrealMCP
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

Describe the problem or limitation you're experiencing.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see. If it's a new command, include the proposed command name, params, and expected result.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered (e.g., using `execute_python` as a fallback).

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information, mockups, or references.
